prompt: Envision the product's appearance post-assembly in a detailed image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which depicts a disassembled fan, to show the product in its fully assembled state. Transform the separate components (Front Guard, Rear Guard, Blade, Plastic Nut, Spinner, Motor Shaft, Oscillating mechanism, Fan Body, Piano-key controls, and Base) into a single, cohesive desk fan. Ensure all parts are correctly fitted together to form the complete product, with a clear and detailed appearance.
